name: Mrs. Zanele Khumalo
qualifications: BEd in Intermediate Phase Teaching, University of Pretoria
description: Mrs. Khumalo is a passionate educator with over 12 years of experience in STEM education. She loves turning complex math problems into fun challenges for her learners.
experience: Over 12 years teaching Mathematics and Natural Sciences in primary schools.
quote: Every child can learn — just not on the same day or in the same way.

name: Mr. Thabo Mokoena
qualifications: BTech in Education and Training, Tshwane University of Technology
description: Mr. Mokoena combines practical skills and innovation to inspire learners to think creatively and apply technology to real-world problems.
experience: 15 years in education, including 8 years specializing in Technology and EMS.
quote: Innovation starts with curiosity and courage.

name: Ms. Lerato Dlamini
qualifications: BA in English and Psychology, University of Johannesburg
description: Ms. Dlamini encourages communication and confidence through reading and writing. Her lessons often include storytelling and group activities.
experience: 6 years of experience in English Language teaching and literacy development.
quote: Words shape the world — one story at a time.

name: Mr. Sipho Nkosi
qualifications: BSc in Physical Sciences, UNISA; PGCE in Mathematics Education
description: Mr. Nkosi's classes are known for hands-on experiments and real-life problem solving that help learners grasp scientific principles deeply.
experience: 10 years teaching Mathematics and Science in the FET phase.
quote: Science is not about memorizing facts, but exploring how things work.

name: Mrs. Nomvula Mthembu
qualifications: BA in Languages and Life Sciences, Stellenbosch University
description: Mrs. Mthembu brings her expertise in both languages and life sciences to the senior phase, empowering learners to balance analytical and creative thinking.
experience: 13 years of experience teaching high school Afrikaans and Life Sciences.
quote: Learning is a journey — not a race.

name: Ms. Nandi Mahlangu
qualifications: BEd in Natural and Geographical Sciences, University of KwaZulu-Natal
description: Ms. Mahlangu inspires curiosity about the natural world and environmental stewardship, integrating field studies into her teaching.
experience: 4 years of experience teaching Geography in high schools.
quote: The world is our classroom — explore it!

name: Mr. Bongani Cele
qualifications: BA in History and Education, University of the Witwatersrand
description: Mr. Cele brings history to life through storytelling, debate, and critical analysis. He helps learners connect past events to modern society and develop strong research skills.
experience: 9 years teaching History at the senior level.
quote: History doesn't repeat itself — people do.

name: Mrs. Roxy Smith
qualifications: BCom in Business Education, University of the Free State
description: Mrs. Smith empowers learners with practical business knowledge and entrepreneurial thinking. Her lessons focus on financial literacy, innovation, and leadership skills for the modern economy.
experience: 11 years of experience in teaching Business Studies and entrepreneurship.
quote: Great leaders start as great learners.
